scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapne humari JEE courses ke baare mein inquiry ki thi. Am I speaking with Ankit?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes... main Ankit. But actually I was just exploring options, not really decided yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul theek hai Ankit! Exploring is good. Tell me, aap currently which class mein ho? And JEE preparation ke liye kya plan hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 11th right now... JEE Main target hai but I'm not sure about coaching and all.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! Class 11 se start karna is ideal. Toh aapke paas almost 21 months hai JEE Main ke liye. Have you started any preparation or looking for structured guidance?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thoda sa self-study kar raha hun... but structured course ki need feel kar raha hun. Though I need to check with parents first.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Smart approach! Parents ke saath discuss karna important hai. Budget ke baare mein koi particular range mind mein hai? We have options starting from ₹19,999 with easy EMIs.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: EMI kitna hota hai? And honestly I'm still comparing different platforms... not in any rush to decide.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: No pressure at all! Our JEE Arjuna 2027 is ₹19,999 with EMI of just ₹1999/month - that's less than most families spend on daily chai! JEE Lakshya 2027 is ₹35,999 at ₹3,499/month for more comprehensive coverage.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay... but what's the difference between these two? And can I get some time to think about it?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! Lakshya has more advanced problem solving, doubt clearing sessions, and additional test series. Arjuna covers all basics thoroughly. Take your time - would you like me to call back after you discuss with parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, that would be better. Maybe call back in 2-3 days? I need to discuss properly and also check other options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call you back on Wednesday. Meanwhile, I'll share course details on WhatsApp. And Ankit, if any urgent questions come up, feel free to call back anytime, okay?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sure, that works. Send the details, I'll go through them. Thanks for understanding that I need time to decide.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! Taking informed decisions is always better. I'll send everything in 5 minutes. All the best with your preparation, and talk to you on Wednesday!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thanks Priya. Will check the materials and discuss with family. Speak soon!
